text.title: llm-powered-conversational-ai Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llm-powered-conversational-ai as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing ASR transcript directly to LLM without confidence filtering.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Low-confidence transcripts (e.g., "buck a flight" for "book a flight") produce wrong LLM intent. Log ASR confidence scores and require LLM confirmation for ambiguous transcripts.

failure-mode.description: Unbounded conversation history without a window limit.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: At 10–15 turns, context window cost and latency increase significantly with no proportional benefit. Use a 5–10 turn window with summarization of older context.

failure-mode.description: Using sentiment scoring instead of explicit escalation triggers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Emotion/tone detection is imprecise — aggressive frustration and mild impatience produce similar ASR output. Use explicit keywords ("agent", "human") as escalation triggers.

failure-mode.description: Storing presigned ASR URLs instead of downloading immediately.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Presigned URLs from ASR services expire. Download the audio or transcript immediately after generation.

failure-mode.description: Long system prompts for persona definition.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keep persona prompt under 200 tokens; use retrieval for factual knowledge. Long system prompts increase latency and cost without proportional quality gain.

failure-mode.description: Relying on automated metrics alone for quality monitoring.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Review conversation logs weekly for hallucinated facts, persona drift, and off-topic escalation. Automated metrics miss nuanced failures. Alert if escalation rate exceeds 10%.
